headline: Block's Cash App Adds Afterpay BNPL: Will This Drive User Engagement?
summary: XYZ expands BNPL access as Afterpay arrives on Cash App Card, letting eligible users split everyday expenses with transparent six-week repayments.

headline: Baker St Cafe Builds a Neighborhood Favorite on Square
summary: DISTRIBUTED-WORKFORCE/OAKLAND, Calif., June 03, 2026--Square today announced that Baker St Cafe - Thai Kitchen & Bubble Tea, a family-run restaurant in McMinnville, Oregon, is utilizing Square's unified commerce platform to power its standing as one of the town's most beloved dining destinations. headline: Block expands Afterpay on Cash App card
summary: After piloting the buy now, pay later service on its debit cards, Block said it’s going mainstream with its option to pay in installments.
